Sprite Fright Stereo Stems.

The files in this bundle are copyrighted © Blender Foundation, and licensed as follows:

* Sprite_Fright-StreamingStereoStem_fullmix.wav: (CC) Blender Foundation - studio.blender.org
* Sprite_Fright-StreamingStereoStem_dialogue.wav: Only use with the existing or your own effects and music stems. Do not edit, except for trimming. Provide opening credit as "Original Dialogues © Blender Foundation - studio.blender.org".
* Sprite_Fright-StreamingStereoStem_effects.wav: Only use with the existing or your own dialogues and music stems. Do not edit, except for trimming.. Provide opening  credit as "Original Sound Effects © Blender Foundation - studio.blender.org".
* Sprite_Fright-StreamingStereoStem_music.wav: Only use with the existing or your own dialogues and effects stems. Do not edit, except for trimming.. Provide opening credit as "Original Music © Blender Foundation - studio.blender.org".

The use of the stems is allowed to create a version of Sprite Fright with alternative music, voices or sound effects (or any combination). When doing so, prepend a slide at the beginning of the film clearly stating what has been changed. For example: "Sprite Fright rescore by <your credit>." or "Sprite Fright SFX design by <your credit>" and then append the copyright note for the stems you use.

For other uses, please reach out to foundation@blender.org.
